channel.title: Thinking on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Thinking on Frank Huang

item.title: Career thought
item.description: Today is the last working day of 2017 which is also the first time I work till 22:30. 2017 has always been toughest year of my life. No matter in my carear or my personal relationship. But I have to say that I am not regret of anything that I have decided to do this year which could be the luckest thing in 2017. At the end of this yeay, I still got some thought about my career.

item.title: Some thought about choosing a framework
item.description: Find out why companies like Google, MSN, and Vevo use Angular. Or why companies like Sony, Reddit, and Pinterest use Backbone. Or why companies like Netflix, Yahoo, and LinkedIn use Ember. – Zack Argyle
